summary.intent: Fix PR review comments on moltis PR #564, resolve review conversations, and address a P1 bug where `cleanup_session` wasn't calling `remove_image_override`, causing image override map leaks.
summary.outcome: Fixed the `cleanup_session` memory leak by adding `remove_image_override` call in the sandbox router, committed and pushed. All PR review threads were resolved.

repo: Sandbox session cleanup in the router requires explicit `remove_image_override` calls — this is not done automatically on session teardown.
Greptile PR summaries flag P1 issues in issue comments, not review threads — need to check both when reviewing PR feedback.
PR is in moltis-org/moltis repo, sandbox code lives at crates/tools/src/sandbox/router.rs

code.finding: `cleanup_session` was missing a call to `remove_image_override`, causing the image override map to leak entries on session cleanup. Fix added the call inside `cleanup_session` so all callers get full cleanup without needing to call it separately.

workflow: GitHub review thread resolution requires thread IDs, not review comment node IDs — these are different GraphQL objects.
After resolving review threads via API, verify by re-fetching unresolved threads rather than assuming success.
Run `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` before committing Rust changes.

friction: Confusion between review comment node IDs and review thread IDs caused failed resolution attempts before finding correct thread IDs.
Remote ref already updated on first push attempt, requiring a pull-rebase before the push succeeded.
Had to check multiple comment sources (review threads, issue comments) to find all feedback — the P1 bug was only in the Greptile summary in issue comments, not in review threads.
